creator: stan@dosonresorthotel.net
text:
Dear FreeBSD,

When I install ImageMagick on the FreeBSD 7.2 machine, the following problems coccur:
===>   Registering installation for libgpg-error-1.7
===>   Returning to build of libgcrypt-1.4.4
Error: shared library "gpg-error.0" does not exist
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/libgcrypt.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/gnutls.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/cups-client.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/cups-image.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/cups-image.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/ghostscript8-nox11.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick.
[root@pc28 /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick]

Please advise.

Sincerely yours

Stanley
